partition_profile.note: This bounded exact C++ profile measures the residual subtype partition task. It is not trusted as proof and does not mark the residual family partition complete.

projection.note: This preflight replaces per-case residual literals with semantic proof-carrying residual families.  The source projection is small, but the bounded residual partition profile shows the exhaustive residual subtype census and family partition still need to be emitted/proved before the backend can be selected.
